raw_consumer_statement:
In XXXX of last year, I applied for a Best Buy credit card issued by Citibank ; however, I never received the physical card. On XXXX I became aware of the issue when I received an alert regarding a past due balance on my credit report of my other Bank. This was the first time I realized the card had been used. I never received, activated, or used this credit card and did not authorize any purchases. 
After reviewing the limited information available to me, I found that multiple transactions had been made ( over XXXX usd ). The only purchases I could identify were those visible through my Best Buy account, there were purchased in person.The other purchases, I was not able to identify, as I never activated the card and therefore do not have access to any Citibank account associated with it. 

At the time these transactions occurred, I was outside the United States on a family XXXX trip, so no way I could not get any alert. I believe the card may have been intercepted and fraudulently activated by an unknown individual who has used it. 

I also contacted Citi Bank to dispute and they can not block the card because they were not able to verify my identity, ( since I never open an account or activate that card ) and refuse to do anything else for this matter, just wait up XXXX  days. NO more options, no another way of verification, nothing. 
I Also found that the online activity was on XX/XX/XXXX at XXXX hours ( see screenshot of email I realized now ) and purchases were transacted XXXX hour later ( when we were out of the USA ) So far I dont know where to go for help, I went on Identity theft as well and submit my dispute, hope it can helps and get some other help to solve this soon.
